content: By 2025, 2025-era autonomous self-supervised learning agents can be repurposed to recursively train next-generation DeepResearch Agents by treating the entire corpus of existing scientific literature and experimental outcomes as an unlabeled interactive environment for self-supervised curiosity-driven exploration. This creates a self-amplifying cycle where DeepResearch Agents improve their own research capabilities by continuously discovering implicit novel connections across unstructured research data without human-labeled training signals.
